title: gamertreet 200 Specia pack
description: this pack is very smooth and made for pvp.
body:
The Ultimate Battle & Survival Pack is a clean, optimized Minecraft texture pack made for PvP, SMP, UHC, and Survival gameplay. It focuses on performance, clear visuals, and an immersive look while keeping the original Minecraft style intact.

Features

Low-fire and clear sword textures for PvP

FPS-friendly performance on all devices

Brighter ores and simple blocks for UHC

Detailed natural blocks for SMP and Survival worlds

Clean and minimal GUI for better focus

Custom armor and weapon textures

Compatibility

Minecraft versions: 1.8 – 1.21

Supported clients: OptiFine, Lunar, Badlion, Feather

Works on most PvP and Survival servers

License

Free for personal use.
Reuploading or modifying without permission is not allowed.
